content_markdown:
## Page: https://vinuni.edu.vn/campus-services

![VinUni Banner](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/themes/vinuni2023/assets/images/vinuni_banner.png)

# Campus Services

Welcome to VinUniversity, where transitioning to campus life opens up exciting opportunities for growth and connection. As a first-year student, you’ll reside in our vibrant dormitories, designed to promote co-living, co-working, and co-learning. This environment encourages you to build meaningful relationships, share diverse academic and cultural experiences, and cultivate respect and responsibility toward others.

Alongside our supportive living arrangements, we prioritize your well-being through comprehensive services. Our Medical Service provides assistance for various health needs, including treatment for minor injuries, over-the-counter medications, and general health advice. Additionally, our dedicated Counseling services offer a safe and confidential space to discuss any concerns—whether related to academic pressures, personal challenges, or emotional well-being. Our counselors are here to support you in navigating stress, anxiety, and relationship struggles.

## RESIDENTIAL LIFE

We understand that moving out of home and moving into a university residence is an exciting time with a lot for you to learn about. At VinUniversity, you will find that living on campus is an integral part of your first-year experience. We hope that you will develop a sense of respect and care for others; make responsible choices about your lifestyle; share your academic, social, and cultural experiences with other residents; and learn to live independently yet in harmony with a diverse group of people.

All first-year students are required to live in VinUni dormitory, co-living, co-working, and co-learning together. We strongly believe that living together allows all you to make social connections, study, learn from one another, and build lasting bonds that will be beneficial throughout your life.

### Dormitory rooms

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/)

### Dormitory Activities

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-activities/)

### Sports Complex

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/)

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

### 1. Operating Hours of the Sports Complex

The Sports Complex at VinUni operates from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM.

### 2. Visits from Family and Friends

Students can receive guests on campus, provided they respect other residents’ privacy and adhere to residence policies during the visit. To apply for relatives and friends to visit, students can fill out this form: **[Visitor Application Form](https://forms.office.com/r/aNKKmh1xsW)**.

### 3. Bringing Motorcycles or Cars

Students may bring motorcycles or cars to the dormitory. For motorcycles, a student ID swipe at the gate is required. For cars, a registration form must be filled out at the security gate. Any issues should be reported to security or the Residential Hotline.

### 4. Freshmen Going Home or Sleeping Outside

Freshmen are allowed to go home or sleep outside the dormitory. However, they must inform the Residential Life management by texting the Residential hotline with their name, student number, reason for staying out overnight, and the date and time of their return.

### 5. Delivery Orders to the Dormitory

Students can receive deliveries at the dormitory. The delivery address should be written as:  
“Security gate/Dormitory gate of VinUni University, Vinhomes Ocean Park, Da Ton Ward, Gia Lam District, Hanoi”  
“Canteen VinUni University, Vinhomes OceanPark, Da Ton Ward, Gia Lam District, Hanoi”

### 6. What to Bring to the Dormitory

Students should bring daily living items like laundry baskets, toilet rolls, towels, and cleaning products. Personal items to make the space feel more like home, such as cups, posters, and photos, are also recommended.

## Health & Well-being

## Medical service

The Medical Service is dedicated to providing practical advice and assistance for various medical needs, including:

* Treating cuts, burns, scalds, and other minor injuries.
* Providing over-the-counter medications.
* Offering general health advice on topics such as smoking cessation, diet, ongoing illness, or health concerns.
* Providing contraception advice and pregnancy risk assessments.

To access the service, a drop-in option is available in Room I119 on the 1st floor of Building I.  
Email: Clinic@vinuni.edu.vn  
VinUni Medical Service Hotline: (+84) 866 200 019

![Medical service](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/clinic-final-scaled-e1711987652205.jpeg)

## Counselling service

Counselling offers a safe and confidential space to talk about anything that’s on your mind, whether it’s related to your studies, personal life, or any other concerns. Our services can help with:

* **Stress**
* **Feelings of depression or anxiety**
* **Relationship struggles**
* **Eating or sleep disorders**
* **Low self-esteem**

But remember, you can discuss much more than just these issues. Whether you’re facing academic pressures, dealing with family matters, or simply need someone to talk to, we’re here to listen and support you.

**Location:** Room I118, 1st floor, Building I  
**Booking:** Schedule an appointment via [My Service](https://my.vinuni.edu.vn/student/s/my-services) on the Student Success page  
**Email:** bewell@vinuni.edu.vn  
**Hotline:** (+84) 868 900 016

**Peer Support:** If you’re hesitant to speak with a counsellor, consider talking to a peer supporter. These trained students, supervised by professional psychologists, are here to listen. Book an appointment with a peer supporter [here](https://vinunipsg.simplybook.asia/v2/?bdp-pixel=1&widget-type=fbdp#book).

**Stay Connected:** We also host events and activities to promote wellbeing. Follow us on social media to stay updated:

* **Facebook:**  [**VinUni Wellbeing Services**](https://www.facebook.com/vinuni.wellbeing)
* **Instagram:** @vinuni.peersupport

![Counselling service](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/counselling-final-final-scaled-1.jpeg)

## Wellbeing Services Activities

**Exam Care**

Every year, we support our students during the stressful exam period by distributing care packages. These packages might include snacks, motivational notes, and essential supplies to help you stay focused and energized. It’s our way of showing that we care about your wellbeing and success.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472799812_576446268354001_8650741208901705914_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472799812_576446268354001_8650741208901705914_n.jpg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472699357_576446028354025_4173742518427341187_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472699357_576446028354025_4173742518427341187_n.jpg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472915917_576446515020643_104670022389310069_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472915917_576446515020643_104670022389310069_n.jpg)

**Mental Health Week**

We celebrate Mental Health Week annually to emphasize the importance of mental health. This week is filled with various activities, workshops, and talks aimed at raising awareness and providing resources to support your mental wellbeing. It’s a time to reflect, learn, and engage in practices that promote mental health.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/462930733_519095620755733_833254254839109806_n-1-660x371.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115887)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/463070272_519099354088693_6085926498479020358_n-427x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115886)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/462960352_519100904088538_2130257406932965228_n-477x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115842)

**Wellbeing Boost Series**

Our Wellbeing Boost series consists of mini events and workshops held throughout our academic year. These sessions cover a variety of topics, from mindfulness and stress management to physical fitness and nutrition. Each event is designed to provide practical tips and techniques that you can incorporate into your daily life to enhance your overall wellbeing.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/HNE-4835-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115890)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/470220632_562317353100226_2553778609414728278_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=121672)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/HNE-4679-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115888)

**Activities**

At Green Sports Day, VinUnians nurtured physical health and enhanced mental well-being. The Wellbeing Booth was a hub of joy, featuring the D.O.S.E. Check-In with colorful handprints, the Hugging Spot for warm embraces, and the Creative Green Corner for planting and self-expression. A heartfelt thank you to everyone who joined and shared their energy! ![🌞](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f31e.svg)![💖](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f496.svg)![✨](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/2728.svg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484052901_624123790252915_2199070084767548545_n-308x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128092)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484353743_624123670252927_5863004458383753128_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128093)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484344822_624123646919596_6164114788143171487_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128094)

“Consent” Booth at VinUniversity Annual Health Check-Up

From February 21-23, 2025, the “Consent” booth at VinUni’s Annual Health Check-Up was a hub of learning and interaction. Located at K101 in the Sports Complex, it provided a space to discuss sexual education and consent. Highlights included expert Q&A sessions, anonymous sharing on a live screen, and distribution of protective items and educational materials. The booth aimed to break misconceptions, reduce stigma around sexual health, and educate on setting boundaries in relationships. Thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to fostering a respectful and health-conscious community!

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481317194_609953988336562_9042656383350636590_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128095)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/480769820_609953945003233_990440477185305994_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128096)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481001651_609953938336567_8340023046416340879_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128097)

“Embracing the Women Cycle” Workshop

On March 5th, Healthy Lifestyle Course by Prof. Lien Trinh hosted the “Embracing the Women Cycle” workshop, led by Ms. Daphne Ngo. Female students engaged in warm, relatable discussions about their bodies, emotions, and natural changes. Thought-provoking questions sparked heartfelt conversations, fostering deep connections. The workshop celebrated women’s beauty and strength, encouraging self-love and awareness. ![💖](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f496.svg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481995658_617716734226954_5769671204304088127_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128099)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/482027626_617717387560222_7752745268057102466_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128100)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/482022760_617716384226989_4607914438388212118_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128101)

## Mini Events

**Get to Know Your Counsellor**

From November 11th to 15th, we hosted the “Get to Know Your Counsellor” mini event to welcome our new counsellor, Ms. Dzung Ngo (Daphne), to the VinUni family. The event provided a fantastic opportunity for students to meet Ms. Daphne and learn more about the support services available.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB2-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115902)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB1-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115903)

We were thrilled to see so many students take advantage of this opportunity to connect with Ms. Daphne. Many students have visited our counselling room, said hi to our counsellor and had some candy treats to kick off their days. For those who have not had a chance to drop by, remember that you can still walk-in during designated hours (10.00 – 12.00 PM Tue & Thu and 3.00 – 5.00 PM Mon, Wed & Fri unless previously booked) or book an appointment through My Services or via email address bewell@vinuni.edu.vn.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB4-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115904)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB3-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115905)

Thank you to everyone who participated and made this event a success. We look forward to more events that foster a supportive and connected community at VinUni!

**Follow us for more information:**   
**Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/leaf.vinunipsg**  
**Instagram:**  
**#VinUni #VinUniversity #VinUniOpenDay #VinUniWellbeing #VinUniPeerSupport #SAM**

## Page: https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room

![Dormitory Room](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09772-scaled.jpg)

Dormitory Room

## Dormitory Room

### 1. Dorm

The residence at VinUni consists of two main buildings, JA and JB, which are interconnected by the main hall JC. Each building houses 35 apartments, available in three types:

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09359-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09359/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09306-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09306-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09354-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09354-hdr/)

* **8-Bed Apartments (~96 m²)** divided into configurations of 3/3/2 bedrooms.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09244-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09244-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09251-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09251-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09257-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09257/)

* **2-Bed Apartments (~21.2 m²)**

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09107-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09107-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09223-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09223-1/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09128-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09128/)

* **4-Bed Apartments (~50.5 m²)** divided into configurations of 2/2 bedrooms.

Female students are accommodated in the JA building, while male students reside in the JB building. This arrangement ensures that students share rooms with peers from different colleges and majors, promoting a residential experience rich in inclusivity and diversity.

### 2. Pantry

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09545-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09545-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09584-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09584/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09540-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09540/)

Each floor of the JA and JB residence buildings at VinUni features a well-equipped pantry area. These communal spaces are furnished with sofas, tables, and chairs, creating a comfortable environment for students to gather, socialize, and enjoy leisure time together. Additionally, each pantry is outfitted with a microwave and a cupboard, enabling students to prepare meals and dine with friends, fostering a sense of community and camaraderie among residents.

### 3. Student kitchen

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09518-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/vi/student_life/cuoc-song-ky-tuc-xa/phong-o-trong-ki-tuc-xa/dan09518/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09526-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/vi/student_life/cuoc-song-ky-tuc-xa/phong-o-trong-ki-tuc-xa/dan09526/)

Located on the second floor of the main hall JC, the student kitchen is a well-equipped culinary space. It features an electric stove, oven, and microwave, allowing students to prepare and cook their meals. However, students are required to bring their own kitchenware and food, as these are not provided. The kitchen is accessible to all students **24/7**. To maintain a clean and safe environment, students are reminded to clean up after themselves and ensure all windows are closed after using the kitchen.

### 4. Reading room

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09463-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09463/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09496-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09496/)

At VinUni, there are cozy and intimate reading rooms located on **Level 1**, specifically in rooms **JA102, JB110, and JB111**. These spaces are ideal for residents seeking a quiet environment for independent learning and reading. Additionally, they can be booked for meetings or events. It is important to note that these reading rooms are not designated for discussions or debates. To respect others using the space, please keep conversations at a low volume.

### 5. Laundry room

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09448-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09448/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09459-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09459/)

The laundry room at VinUni is conveniently located on **level 1**, in room **JB101**, and is operated by an external service provider. Equipped with washers and dryers, the facility is exclusively available to residents at a nominal cost. Should any issues arise concerning the operation of the laundry equipment, residents are advised to report them to the Residential Offices or directly to the laundry service provider. In urgent situations, students are encouraged to call the maintenance or security hotlines for immediate assistance.

### 6. Social hubs JA-JB

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN00131-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan00131/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09428-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09428/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09409-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09409-1/)

At VinUni, staying connected with fellow residents in the dormitories is made easy through various communal areas. These spaces are designed for residents to spend quality time together, engage in conversations, and build bonds in their daily lives. **The social hubs in JA and JB**, located on **level 1**, are equipped with table sports games, providing students with a fun and relaxing way to enjoy their breaks with friends.

### 7. Parking area

![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09784-615x410.jpg)

The dormitory at VinUni features a parking lot that is available to residents, students, and guests. Parking is free of charge during the day. However, off-campus students and guests who wish to park overnight without prior notice will be subject to a parking fee. This policy ensures fair and efficient use of the parking facilities for all members of the VinUni community.

### 8. VinUniversity Off-Campus Housing

Located just 350m from Masteri Waterfront, these accommodations offer students easy access to campus facilities, libraries, and recreational areas. The walkable distance also promotes a healthy lifestyle and fosters a sense of community among students.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08362-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08362/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08179-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08179/)

  

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08578-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08578/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08641-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08641/)

## Page: https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex

![VinUni Banner](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/themes/vinuni2023/assets/images/vinuni_banner.png)

## Sports Complex

The Sports Complex at VinUni is divided into two main areas: indoor and outdoor.

**Indoor Area:**

The first floor features a variety of fitness rooms including a gym and yoga studio, and a multi-purpose full-sized court for basketball, volleyball, table tennis, and badminton.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5395-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5395/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5428-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5428/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Screenshot-2024-11-22-090425-660x321.png)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/screenshot-2024-11-22-090425/)

The second floor houses a mirror room for dance activities, a Kendo room, and a well-equipped music room.  
The indoor facilities also include an all-season swimming pool for year-round use.

**Outdoor Area:**

This area boasts a full-sized soccer pitch with a surrounding running track.  
There are also specialized zones for tennis, basketball, and volleyball practice, catering to a wide range of sports interests.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5122-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5122/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5123-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5123/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5127-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5127/)

pages.content_markdown:
![VinUni Banner](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/themes/vinuni2023/assets/images/vinuni_banner.png)

# Campus Services

Welcome to VinUniversity, where transitioning to campus life opens up exciting opportunities for growth and connection. As a first-year student, you’ll reside in our vibrant dormitories, designed to promote co-living, co-working, and co-learning. This environment encourages you to build meaningful relationships, share diverse academic and cultural experiences, and cultivate respect and responsibility toward others.

Alongside our supportive living arrangements, we prioritize your well-being through comprehensive services. Our Medical Service provides assistance for various health needs, including treatment for minor injuries, over-the-counter medications, and general health advice. Additionally, our dedicated Counseling services offer a safe and confidential space to discuss any concerns—whether related to academic pressures, personal challenges, or emotional well-being. Our counselors are here to support you in navigating stress, anxiety, and relationship struggles.

## RESIDENTIAL LIFE

We understand that moving out of home and moving into a university residence is an exciting time with a lot for you to learn about. At VinUniversity, you will find that living on campus is an integral part of your first-year experience. We hope that you will develop a sense of respect and care for others; make responsible choices about your lifestyle; share your academic, social, and cultural experiences with other residents; and learn to live independently yet in harmony with a diverse group of people.

All first-year students are required to live in VinUni dormitory, co-living, co-working, and co-learning together. We strongly believe that living together allows all you to make social connections, study, learn from one another, and build lasting bonds that will be beneficial throughout your life.

### Dormitory rooms

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/)

### Dormitory Activities

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-activities/)

### Sports Complex

[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/)

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

### 1. Operating Hours of the Sports Complex

The Sports Complex at VinUni operates from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM.

### 2. Visits from Family and Friends

Students can receive guests on campus, provided they respect other residents’ privacy and adhere to residence policies during the visit. To apply for relatives and friends to visit, students can fill out this form: **[Visitor Application Form](https://forms.office.com/r/aNKKmh1xsW)**.

### 3. Bringing Motorcycles or Cars

Students may bring motorcycles or cars to the dormitory. For motorcycles, a student ID swipe at the gate is required. For cars, a registration form must be filled out at the security gate. Any issues should be reported to security or the Residential Hotline.

### 4. Freshmen Going Home or Sleeping Outside

Freshmen are allowed to go home or sleep outside the dormitory. However, they must inform the Residential Life management by texting the Residential hotline with their name, student number, reason for staying out overnight, and the date and time of their return.

### 5. Delivery Orders to the Dormitory

Students can receive deliveries at the dormitory. The delivery address should be written as:  
“Security gate/Dormitory gate of VinUni University, Vinhomes Ocean Park, Da Ton Ward, Gia Lam District, Hanoi”  
“Canteen VinUni University, Vinhomes OceanPark, Da Ton Ward, Gia Lam District, Hanoi”

### 6. What to Bring to the Dormitory

Students should bring daily living items like laundry baskets, toilet rolls, towels, and cleaning products. Personal items to make the space feel more like home, such as cups, posters, and photos, are also recommended.

## Health & Well-being

## Medical service

The Medical Service is dedicated to providing practical advice and assistance for various medical needs, including:

* Treating cuts, burns, scalds, and other minor injuries.
* Providing over-the-counter medications.
* Offering general health advice on topics such as smoking cessation, diet, ongoing illness, or health concerns.
* Providing contraception advice and pregnancy risk assessments.

To access the service, a drop-in option is available in Room I119 on the 1st floor of Building I.  
Email: Clinic@vinuni.edu.vn  
VinUni Medical Service Hotline: (+84) 866 200 019

![Medical service](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/clinic-final-scaled-e1711987652205.jpeg)

## Counselling service

Counselling offers a safe and confidential space to talk about anything that’s on your mind, whether it’s related to your studies, personal life, or any other concerns. Our services can help with:

* **Stress**
* **Feelings of depression or anxiety**
* **Relationship struggles**
* **Eating or sleep disorders**
* **Low self-esteem**

But remember, you can discuss much more than just these issues. Whether you’re facing academic pressures, dealing with family matters, or simply need someone to talk to, we’re here to listen and support you.

**Location:** Room I118, 1st floor, Building I  
**Booking:** Schedule an appointment via [My Service](https://my.vinuni.edu.vn/student/s/my-services) on the Student Success page  
**Email:** bewell@vinuni.edu.vn  
**Hotline:** (+84) 868 900 016

**Peer Support:** If you’re hesitant to speak with a counsellor, consider talking to a peer supporter. These trained students, supervised by professional psychologists, are here to listen. Book an appointment with a peer supporter [here](https://vinunipsg.simplybook.asia/v2/?bdp-pixel=1&widget-type=fbdp#book).

**Stay Connected:** We also host events and activities to promote wellbeing. Follow us on social media to stay updated:

* **Facebook:**  [**VinUni Wellbeing Services**](https://www.facebook.com/vinuni.wellbeing)
* **Instagram:** @vinuni.peersupport

![Counselling service](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/counselling-final-final-scaled-1.jpeg)

## Wellbeing Services Activities

**Exam Care**

Every year, we support our students during the stressful exam period by distributing care packages. These packages might include snacks, motivational notes, and essential supplies to help you stay focused and energized. It’s our way of showing that we care about your wellbeing and success.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472799812_576446268354001_8650741208901705914_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472799812_576446268354001_8650741208901705914_n.jpg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472699357_576446028354025_4173742518427341187_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472699357_576446028354025_4173742518427341187_n.jpg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472915917_576446515020643_104670022389310069_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/472915917_576446515020643_104670022389310069_n.jpg)

**Mental Health Week**

We celebrate Mental Health Week annually to emphasize the importance of mental health. This week is filled with various activities, workshops, and talks aimed at raising awareness and providing resources to support your mental wellbeing. It’s a time to reflect, learn, and engage in practices that promote mental health.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/462930733_519095620755733_833254254839109806_n-1-660x371.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115887)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/463070272_519099354088693_6085926498479020358_n-427x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115886)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/462960352_519100904088538_2130257406932965228_n-477x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115842)

**Wellbeing Boost Series**

Our Wellbeing Boost series consists of mini events and workshops held throughout our academic year. These sessions cover a variety of topics, from mindfulness and stress management to physical fitness and nutrition. Each event is designed to provide practical tips and techniques that you can incorporate into your daily life to enhance your overall wellbeing.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/HNE-4835-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115890)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/470220632_562317353100226_2553778609414728278_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=121672)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/HNE-4679-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115888)

**Activities**

At Green Sports Day, VinUnians nurtured physical health and enhanced mental well-being. The Wellbeing Booth was a hub of joy, featuring the D.O.S.E. Check-In with colorful handprints, the Hugging Spot for warm embraces, and the Creative Green Corner for planting and self-expression. A heartfelt thank you to everyone who joined and shared their energy! ![🌞](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f31e.svg)![💖](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f496.svg)![✨](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/2728.svg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484052901_624123790252915_2199070084767548545_n-308x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128092)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484353743_624123670252927_5863004458383753128_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128093)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/484344822_624123646919596_6164114788143171487_n-547x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128094)

“Consent” Booth at VinUniversity Annual Health Check-Up

From February 21-23, 2025, the “Consent” booth at VinUni’s Annual Health Check-Up was a hub of learning and interaction. Located at K101 in the Sports Complex, it provided a space to discuss sexual education and consent. Highlights included expert Q&A sessions, anonymous sharing on a live screen, and distribution of protective items and educational materials. The booth aimed to break misconceptions, reduce stigma around sexual health, and educate on setting boundaries in relationships. Thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to fostering a respectful and health-conscious community!

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481317194_609953988336562_9042656383350636590_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128095)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/480769820_609953945003233_990440477185305994_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128096)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481001651_609953938336567_8340023046416340879_n-489x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128097)

“Embracing the Women Cycle” Workshop

On March 5th, Healthy Lifestyle Course by Prof. Lien Trinh hosted the “Embracing the Women Cycle” workshop, led by Ms. Daphne Ngo. Female students engaged in warm, relatable discussions about their bodies, emotions, and natural changes. Thought-provoking questions sparked heartfelt conversations, fostering deep connections. The workshop celebrated women’s beauty and strength, encouraging self-love and awareness. ![💖](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f496.svg)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/481995658_617716734226954_5769671204304088127_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128099)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/482027626_617717387560222_7752745268057102466_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128100)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/482022760_617716384226989_4607914438388212118_n-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=128101)

## Mini Events

**Get to Know Your Counsellor**

From November 11th to 15th, we hosted the “Get to Know Your Counsellor” mini event to welcome our new counsellor, Ms. Dzung Ngo (Daphne), to the VinUni family. The event provided a fantastic opportunity for students to meet Ms. Daphne and learn more about the support services available.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB2-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115902)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB1-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115903)

We were thrilled to see so many students take advantage of this opportunity to connect with Ms. Daphne. Many students have visited our counselling room, said hi to our counsellor and had some candy treats to kick off their days. For those who have not had a chance to drop by, remember that you can still walk-in during designated hours (10.00 – 12.00 PM Tue & Thu and 3.00 – 5.00 PM Mon, Wed & Fri unless previously booked) or book an appointment through My Services or via email address bewell@vinuni.edu.vn.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB4-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115904)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/WB3-scaled.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/?attachment_id=115905)

Thank you to everyone who participated and made this event a success. We look forward to more events that foster a supportive and connected community at VinUni!

**Follow us for more information:**   
**Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/leaf.vinunipsg**  
**Instagram:**  
**#VinUni #VinUniversity #VinUniOpenDay #VinUniWellbeing #VinUniPeerSupport #SAM**

![Dormitory Room](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09772-scaled.jpg)

Dormitory Room

## Dormitory Room

### 1. Dorm

The residence at VinUni consists of two main buildings, JA and JB, which are interconnected by the main hall JC. Each building houses 35 apartments, available in three types:

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09359-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09359/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09306-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09306-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09354-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09354-hdr/)

* **8-Bed Apartments (~96 m²)** divided into configurations of 3/3/2 bedrooms.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09244-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09244-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09251-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09251-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09257-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09257/)

* **2-Bed Apartments (~21.2 m²)**

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09107-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09107-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09223-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09223-1/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09128-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09128/)

* **4-Bed Apartments (~50.5 m²)** divided into configurations of 2/2 bedrooms.

Female students are accommodated in the JA building, while male students reside in the JB building. This arrangement ensures that students share rooms with peers from different colleges and majors, promoting a residential experience rich in inclusivity and diversity.

### 2. Pantry

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09545-HDR-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09545-hdr/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09584-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09584/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09540-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09540/)

Each floor of the JA and JB residence buildings at VinUni features a well-equipped pantry area. These communal spaces are furnished with sofas, tables, and chairs, creating a comfortable environment for students to gather, socialize, and enjoy leisure time together. Additionally, each pantry is outfitted with a microwave and a cupboard, enabling students to prepare meals and dine with friends, fostering a sense of community and camaraderie among residents.

### 3. Student kitchen

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09518-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/vi/student_life/cuoc-song-ky-tuc-xa/phong-o-trong-ki-tuc-xa/dan09518/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09526-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/vi/student_life/cuoc-song-ky-tuc-xa/phong-o-trong-ki-tuc-xa/dan09526/)

Located on the second floor of the main hall JC, the student kitchen is a well-equipped culinary space. It features an electric stove, oven, and microwave, allowing students to prepare and cook their meals. However, students are required to bring their own kitchenware and food, as these are not provided. The kitchen is accessible to all students **24/7**. To maintain a clean and safe environment, students are reminded to clean up after themselves and ensure all windows are closed after using the kitchen.

### 4. Reading room

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09463-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09463/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09496-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09496/)

At VinUni, there are cozy and intimate reading rooms located on **Level 1**, specifically in rooms **JA102, JB110, and JB111**. These spaces are ideal for residents seeking a quiet environment for independent learning and reading. Additionally, they can be booked for meetings or events. It is important to note that these reading rooms are not designated for discussions or debates. To respect others using the space, please keep conversations at a low volume.

### 5. Laundry room

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09448-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09448/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09459-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09459/)

The laundry room at VinUni is conveniently located on **level 1**, in room **JB101**, and is operated by an external service provider. Equipped with washers and dryers, the facility is exclusively available to residents at a nominal cost. Should any issues arise concerning the operation of the laundry equipment, residents are advised to report them to the Residential Offices or directly to the laundry service provider. In urgent situations, students are encouraged to call the maintenance or security hotlines for immediate assistance.

### 6. Social hubs JA-JB

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN00131-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan00131/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09428-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09428/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09409-1-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/dan09409-1/)

At VinUni, staying connected with fellow residents in the dormitories is made easy through various communal areas. These spaces are designed for residents to spend quality time together, engage in conversations, and build bonds in their daily lives. **The social hubs in JA and JB**, located on **level 1**, are equipped with table sports games, providing students with a fun and relaxing way to enjoy their breaks with friends.

### 7. Parking area

![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DAN09784-615x410.jpg)

The dormitory at VinUni features a parking lot that is available to residents, students, and guests. Parking is free of charge during the day. However, off-campus students and guests who wish to park overnight without prior notice will be subject to a parking fee. This policy ensures fair and efficient use of the parking facilities for all members of the VinUni community.

### 8. VinUniversity Off-Campus Housing

Located just 350m from Masteri Waterfront, these accommodations offer students easy access to campus facilities, libraries, and recreational areas. The walkable distance also promotes a healthy lifestyle and fosters a sense of community among students.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08362-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08362/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08179-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08179/)

  

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08578-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08578/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/BOT08641-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/dormitory-room/bot08641/)

## Sports Complex

The Sports Complex at VinUni is divided into two main areas: indoor and outdoor.

**Indoor Area:**

The first floor features a variety of fitness rooms including a gym and yoga studio, and a multi-purpose full-sized court for basketball, volleyball, table tennis, and badminton.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5395-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5395/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5428-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5428/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Screenshot-2024-11-22-090425-660x321.png)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/screenshot-2024-11-22-090425/)

The second floor houses a mirror room for dance activities, a Kendo room, and a well-equipped music room.  
The indoor facilities also include an all-season swimming pool for year-round use.

**Outdoor Area:**

This area boasts a full-sized soccer pitch with a surrounding running track.  
There are also specialized zones for tennis, basketball, and volleyball practice, catering to a wide range of sports interests.

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5122-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5122/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5123-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5123/)

[![](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HNE-5127-615x410.jpg)](https://vinuni.edu.vn/student_life/residential-life/sport-complex/hne-5127/)
